description.value: Speak cutting words at one creature you can see within medium range. Target takes [[/damage 4 type=psychic]] damage and makes [[/save type=will]]. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. If you have more, target adds 1 to both their dice on their next attack roll before end of their next turn.

system.effect: Speak cutting words at one creature you can see within medium range. Target takes 4 psychic damage and makes Will save. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. If you have more, target adds 1 to both their dice on their next attack roll before end of their next turn.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = Fails, 1 = Half damage (2), 2 = Full damage (4) + attack penalty, 3 = Enhanced damage (8) + attack penalty
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
